ON AIR
[ON AIR]

STATION DAGNELLI — BROADCASTING FROM LONDON

TONIGHT'S PROGRAMME: "THE MULTIPLIER EFFECT"

good evening, listeners. tonight we're talking about what happens when you don't just deliver — you build the capability for others to deliver too.

our subject: daniele d'agnelli. at deloitte, he didn't just run projects. he built an entire anaplan practice from nothing. zero practitioners to twenty-five plus. that's not consulting. that's institution-building.

at c3 ai, the pattern continued. partner enablement across consulting firms. practice-building. training the trainers. leading a 20+ cross-functional team across app dev, data science, qa, and devops. not just shipping software — shipping the ability to ship software.

the result? $15m in programme value. $18m ebit impact for clients. nps above 70, which in this business is like getting a standing ovation from people who don't stand.

this has been station dagnelli. transmitting on all frequencies.
[signal] [github] [linkedin]
